name: PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC CO /OR/
summary: . HB 3179 In response to increasing utility bills and concerns about affordability, the Oregon Legislature in 2025 passed HB 3179. Under the provisions of the legislation, which will require a significant amount of rulemaking to implement, the OPUC shall balance the interests of the utility investor and the consumer by considering the cumulative economic impact of the proposed price or schedule of prices on the electric or natural gas companys residential customers.
